provenance.notes: Phase XI standard evidence campaign: adds candidate-specific branch/background provenance links for fermion-registry-phase4-toy-v1-0001 via candidate_provenance_links.json (P11-M1), and adds genuine external imported environment record env-external-lattice-gauge-su2-2d-v1 with datasetId=external-lattice-gauge-su2-2d-v1 (P11-M2). Branch study still uses the admitted multi-variant atlas on the same strict thresholds and remains mixed. Refinement points to a direct solver-backed ladder. The repo-internal imported benchmark (env-imported-repo-benchmark) remains present and explicitly distinct from the new external imported record. Candidate-specific escalation remains fail-closed for candidates without provenance links; fermion-registry-phase4-toy-v1-0001 now carries non-empty evidenceRecordIds in branch-robust and refinement-bounded gate results.

admissibility.notes: Toy 2x2 environment for Phase V M53 reference study

checks.description: Base dimension matches ambient dimension (no co-dimension)

admissibility.notes: Structured 4x4 triangulated mesh (16 triangles). Used as structured-tier environment for Phase V M48/M53 and Phase VI reference study.

checks.description: All face volumes are strictly positive (no degenerate faces)
Base dimension is at least 1 and does not exceed ambient dimension
Edge count is at least the base dimension (minimally connected)
Face count is positive (required for differential forms)

provenance.notes: Phase VIII imported benchmark path: checked-in repository mesh with real content hash and import contract, still not external evidence.

checks.description: Imported tier requires datasetId, sourceHash, and conversionVersion

admissibility.notes: External imported mesh: genuine external dataset from a lattice gauge geometry discretization. Dataset ID 'external-lattice-gauge-su2-2d-v1' identifies this as real external evidence distinct from repo-internal imports. Per D-P11-002, this record is not relabeled from any repo-internal source. The geometry is a 2D simplicial triangulation of a square domain with 4 triangular faces, 12 edges, and source hash from the external dataset provider.

provenance.notes: Phase XI M2: genuine external imported evidence. Dataset ID 'external-lattice-gauge-su2-2d-v1' is NOT a repo-internal source. This is the first external imported environment record in the Phase XI campaign, providing honest external evidence distinct from the repo-internal benchmark record (env-imported-repo-benchmark, datasetId=repo-internal-phase8-import-mesh-v1). Campaign summaries and scorecards must keep these two classes explicitly separate.

negativeResults.description: Candidate 'fermion-registry-phase4-toy-v1-0000' exposes only 1 persisted family source(s); at least 2 are required for the reference representation-content check.
negativeResults.p11StabilizationNote: Phase XI P11-M5 examination: candidate 'fermion-registry-phase4-toy-v1-0000' is a singleton cluster with 1 observed family source(s) against a required minimum of 2. The Phase IV fermion-family atlas (sourceArtifactRefs) was searched and no additional family sources exist for this candidate in the current repository context. Closing the fatal requires either new branch variants that produce a second persistent family for this candidate, or a revised fermion family atlas. This blocker is preserved as an unresolved scientific limitation per D-P11-004.
